response: The goddess associated with the goddess Frigg includes tales such as the story of Nanna and Baldr, where Nanna is the wife of Baldr and the couple produced a son, the god Forseti. After Baldr's death, Nanna dies of grief and is placed on Baldr's ship with his corpse, where they are set aflame and pushed out to sea. In Hel, Baldr and Nanna are reunited. Nanna is frequently mentioned in the poetry of skalds and a Nanna, who may or may not be the same figure, is mentioned once in the "Poetic Edda".
